title: Set up Stripe Connect for marketplace and platform payments
summary: Create Express connected accounts, onboard sellers via Stripe-hosted UI, route payments with destination charges and application fees, handle Connect webhooks, and transfer funds.
declaration: I will set up Stripe Connect using Express connected accounts — the fastest path to marketplace payments. This covers seller onboarding, destination charges with platform fees, and Connect webhooks. I will NOT set up Custom accounts (requires Stripe approval and full compliance UI) or set up Standard accounts (no platform fee control) unless you specify. If you only need subscriptions or one-time Stripe Checkout, see the setup-stripe-nextjs skill instead.
